categories.description: Page box definitions required for prepress workflows.

rules.displayName: Page does not have TrimBox or ArtBox
rules.description: Either ArtBox or TrimBox should be defined for pages used in prepress. PDF/X ISO standards require the presence of one of these boxes.

categories.description: Required document-level entries and structural integrity.

rules.description: The Document ID in a PDF document is required by PDF/X standards. It consists of two hex strings in the file trailer.
An XObject stream is missing its required Subtype entry. This causes Adobe Acrobat to crash with an unrecoverable error (error 18).

rules.displayName: Document is damaged and could not be loaded
rules.description: The PDF file could not be parsed. It may be truncated, corrupted, or not a valid PDF file.

categories.description: PDF/X output intent and ICC profile configuration.

rules.displayName: Output intent ICC profile stream missing required attributes
rules.description: The DestOutputProfile ICC stream should have /N (number of color components), /Alternate (fallback device color space), and ideally /Filter /FlateDecode for compression. Missing attributes may cause compatibility issues with older PDF readers.

categories.description: Optional content group structure and registration.

rules.displayName: Layer (OCG) not listed in document's OCProperties
rules.description: The PDF specification requires that a layer must be defined in the document's layer dictionary (OCProperties) in order to be displayed in a viewer.

rules.displayName: Optional content configuration dictionary has no Name entry
rules.description: PDF/X-4 requires that each optional content configuration dictionary (OCCD) has a Name entry which is unique throughout the PDF.

categories.description: XMP metadata presence and PDF/X conformance entries.

rules.description: PDF/X standards require the presence of XMP metadata in the document catalog.

rules.displayName: XMP does not have VersionID entry
rules.description: The XMP Media Management Schema requires a VersionID entry for PDF/X conformance.
The XMP PDF/X Identification schema must contain a GTS_PDFXVersion entry set to 'PDF/X-4'.

rules.displayName: Producer mismatch between Document Info and XMP Metadata
rules.description: The Producer field in the document's Info dictionary must match the Producer entry in the XMP metadata.

categories.description: Device color spaces must be compatible with the PDF/X output intent profile.

rules.displayName: CMYK used but PDF/X OutputIntent not CMYK
rules.description: DeviceCMYK color spaces or operators found in document content, but the output intent profile is not CMYK. PDF/X-4 requires that Device color spaces match the output intent.

rules.displayName: RGB used but PDF/X OutputIntent not RGB
rules.description: DeviceRGB color spaces or operators found in document content, but the output intent profile is not RGB. PDF/X-4 requires that Device color spaces match the output intent.

rules.displayName: DeviceGray used but OutputIntent not Gray or CMYK
rules.description: DeviceGray color spaces or operators found in document content, but the output intent profile is neither Gray nor CMYK. PDF/X-4 permits DeviceGray in CMYK and Gray output intents, but not in RGB-only output intents.

categories.description: PDF/X-4 requires all fonts used for visible text to be embedded.

rules.displayName: Font not embedded (and text rendering mode not 3)
rules.description: All fonts used for visible text must be embedded in the PDF. Unembedded fonts rely on the viewer to supply a substitute, which may differ from the intended appearance.

set-geometry-from-mediabox.description: Sets TrimBox, BleedBox, and CropBox to the page's MediaBox values.

add-document-id.description: Generates a random 16-byte hex string pair and sets it as the document ID in the trailer.

fix-output-intent-profile.displayName: Fix output intent ICC profile attributes
fix-output-intent-profile.description: Adds /N (color components), /Alternate (device color space), and /Filter /FlateDecode to the DestOutputProfile stream. The color component count and alternate space are determined from the ICC profile header.

strip-orphaned-ocg.description: Removes OCG references from page content and Form XObjects that are not listed in the document's OCProperties dictionary.

add-occd-name.description: Adds a Name entry to the default optional content configuration dictionary.

generate-minimal-xmp.description: Creates a minimal XMP metadata stream with required entries from the document's Info dictionary.

patch-xmp-metadata.description: Adds missing required entries to existing XMP metadata: VersionID, DocumentID, GTS_PDFXVersion, and syncs Producer and dates with the Info dictionary.

embed-missing-fonts.description: Extracts font programs from Ghostscript WASM via a PostScript proxy and transplants them into the PDF. The original PDF is never processed by Ghostscript — only the font program bytes are transferred. Standard PDF fonts are substituted with metric-compatible URW alternatives (e.g., Helvetica → NimbusSans). Fonts not available in Ghostscript's library are reported as unfixable.
